title: Relational Baseline
description: Per-entity EWMA baseline tracking for affect dimensions (valence, arousal, salience). Stored in learning_state.relational_baseline keyed by entity hash. Entity hashes are opaque client-side identifiers; no entity names or identifying information are stored server-side.

valence.description: EWMA valence score for this entity (alpha=0.1). Seeded from global affect baseline.

arousal.description: EWMA arousal score for this entity (alpha=0.1). Seeded from global affect baseline.

salience.description: EWMA salience score for this entity (alpha=0.1). Higher = more frequently mentioned.

sample_count.description: Number of turns in which this entity was observed. Used for warmup gating.

valence_variance.description: EWMA variance of per-turn valence residuals. Captures the actor's normal oscillation amplitude on this axis. Used with the EWMA mean to compute z-score deviation; escalation fires when |obs - mean| / sqrt(variance) exceeds k_sigma rather than on universal absolute thresholds. Seeded at 0.04 (std≈0.2) on first encounter.

arousal_variance.description: EWMA variance of per-turn arousal residuals. See valence_variance for semantics.

salience_variance.description: EWMA variance of per-turn salience residuals. See valence_variance for semantics.

valence_crossing_rate.description: EWMA of 'did the per-turn valence residual flip sign this turn?' (0..1). Captures the actor's natural oscillation frequency on this axis. A naturally-flat actor has low crossing_rate; a volatile actor has high crossing_rate. Used by the shape (rhythm) check to decide what run_length is anomalous for THIS actor.

arousal_crossing_rate.description: EWMA of arousal residual sign flips. See valence_crossing_rate.

salience_crossing_rate.description: EWMA of salience residual sign flips. See valence_crossing_rate.

valence_run_length.description: Signed count of consecutive same-direction valence residuals. Positive = sustained drift up, negative = sustained drift down, 0 = no prior direction. Detects sustained shifts that stay inside the amplitude envelope but break the actor's normal rhythm (heartbeat-shape analogy).

arousal_run_length.description: Signed run length on arousal residuals. See valence_run_length.

salience_run_length.description: Signed run length on salience residuals. See valence_run_length.

last_updated_utc.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last EWMA update.
